response.global_summary: This video is a teaser/promotional clip for the 'Nakiri Ayame 7th Anniversary Live: Tennyo Ryoran' event. It features a montage of different Hololive VTubers, followed by a vocal performance by Nakiri Ayame of her song 'Hyakka Ryoran'.

scenes.description: Intro montage showing various Hololive VTubers. Text overlays indicate the event 'Nakiri Ayame 7th Anniversary Live: Tennyo Ryoran'.
Nakiri Ayame performs the song 'Hyakka Ryoran' on a 3D stage. Song title '百花繚乱' appears on screen.
